title: Schedule Record Schema
description: Validates a normalized schedule record representing scheduled work from Prismatic, AGY, Jules, or other provider task-managers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the schedule, prefixed by owner (e.g., 'prismatic:cron:backup').

name.description: Human-readable name or description of the scheduled job.

owner.description: The owning provider or service hosting the schedule.

schedule_expr.description: The raw schedule expression, such as a cron expression (* * * * *) or systemd timer spec.

enabled.description: Whether the schedule is currently active and will trigger future runs.

next_run_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the next expected execution time, if known.

fired_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job last triggered.

status.description: Execution outcome of the last run.

run_id.description: Reference to the Prismatic agent run/workflow ID, if applicable.

duration_sec.description: Execution duration in seconds, if known.

error_message.description: Error details if the last execution failed.

last_run.description: Details about the most recent execution attempt.

deep_link.description: Deep link URL to inspect or manage the schedule on the remote provider UI.
